Title: Kaun Banega Crorepati?
Actors: Amitabh Bachchan, Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone
Plot: An Indian version of the popular quiz show, "Who Wants to be a Millionaire?" Contestants start off with easy questions, but as they move forward the questions get more and more challenging. To help them out, they are given "lifelines" that let them either eliminate two of the four possible answers, call a friend at home for help, or take a poll of the audience for what they think the right answer is.
